dialogue: Alex, what's up?
Hey Robin!!
Just checking in, what're you up to?
I'm on my way to work.
Ahh nice nice...
still working for Atman?
Yeah, not like there's really any other good jobs around here.
Hah! I think calling Atman a good gig is stretching it a bit.
Well I'm independent and can pay my bills, which is more than what some people have.
As long as I'm able to live off it, I don't care if it's menial production line work.
Well if barely scraping by at a passionless job is what makes you happy, then I'm glad you're happy.
I won't be barely scraping by for long, I'm getting a raise soon.
Really?
Yeah.
The manager's been talking about a "Big Change" coming soon..
People are pretty sure the top performers are getting raises.
I'm deciding to be positive for once.
I need a new fridge.
You really think that "Big Change" is gonna be a positive one?
They're probably laying off people or replacing everyone with robots.
I don't think you should get your hopes up.
...So did you call me for any actual reason?
Or was it just to be an ass.
I'm just being realistic, Robin
You're only realistic when it comes to my business, aren't you?
I mean, I don't think it was realistic to turn a profit on that brewing setup for your piss ale but I didn't say anything.
God you're impossible.
What I wanted to say was happy birthday, and that mom and dad are wishing you well.
they'd like you to come home for Christmas.
My birthday is tomorrow, and hell no.
You know how that would go.
Yeah, but they'd be badgering me if I didn't at least ask.
I hope you have a good birthday, Robin.
Thanks. Bye.
